channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Samsung launches Father's Day sale with some of the year's best deals on the Galaxy S26 Ultra, Watch 8 Ultra, and beyond
item.description: Whether you're shopping for a dad (or you're a dad yourself), Samsung's Father's Day sale has sweet tech deals for everyone.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: 'When we started our studio, we were building the wrong games.' Millions of Meta Quest owners are playing games like Ug VR every month, and they're redefining VR as we once knew it
item.description: Many thought games like Assassin's Creed, Batman, and The Walking Dead were the future of VR. Turns out, they were wrong.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A screenshot of players trading in Ug VR
media:content.media:text: A screenshot of players trading in Ug VR
media:content.media:title: A screenshot of players trading in Ug VR

item.title: The Meta Quest's new UI is a beautiful disaster. Here's how to navigate through its most frustrating flaws
item.description: The new Meta Quest UI sure is pretty, but it's pretty hard to work with. Here's how to navigate Navigator.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset with the Navigator menu UI overlayed on the image
media:content.media:text: Wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset with the Navigator menu UI overlayed on the image
media:content.media:title: Wearing a Meta Quest 3 headset with the Navigator menu UI overlayed on the image

item.title: Samsung Wallet’s new digital passport sounds convenient, but the internet isn’t sold
item.description: Samsung’s new TSA-approved digital ID sounds convenient for Galaxy users, but privacy fears, buggy airport support, and CLEAR skepticism are already raising red flags online.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Wallet
media:content.media:text: Samsung Wallet
media:content.media:title: Samsung Wallet

item.title: Oura Ring 5 is here — it's 40% smaller than the Ring 4 and monitors your blood pressure
item.description: Oura has launched the Oura Ring 5 with a smaller design and new blood pressure tracking features.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Some lifestyle and key images of Oura Ring 5
media:content.media:text: Some lifestyle and key images of Oura Ring 5
media:content.media:title: Some lifestyle and key images of Oura Ring 5

item.title: Concerned about privacy on your Android? Here’s why Bitdefender is your all-in-one solution
item.description: A smarter approach to Android privacy, with tools that protect your data across apps, websites, and public networks
item.author: tips@androidcentral.com (Sponsored)
item.dc:creator: Sponsored

media:content.media:description: Man holding a smartphone in a room
media:content.media:text: Man holding a smartphone in a room
media:content.media:title: Man holding a smartphone in a room

item.title: Motorola Razr 2026 vs. Razr 2024: Is it finally time to upgrade?
item.description: The Motorola Razr 2026 is the latest offering but it's also more expensive. The 2024 Razr is still on sale for half the price, but is it still worth it?
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.

item.title: 3 ways you can use Circle to Search to identify songs on any Android phone
item.description: Tired of using a third-party app or Gemini to recognize songs? You can do it in three ways using Circle to Search instead.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Circle to Search on the Motorola Razr Fold
media:content.media:text: Circle to Search on the Motorola Razr Fold
media:content.media:title: Circle to Search on the Motorola Razr Fold

item.title: This secure email service just gave me a real reason to ditch Gmail
item.description: Proton Mail can now pull in Gmail emails and let users send messages from their Gmail address directly inside the app.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Gmail app icon on an Android phone screen
media:content.media:text: Gmail app icon on an Android phone screen
media:content.media:title: Gmail app icon on an Android phone screen

item.title: The US phone market struggled in Q1, but one Android maker made serious headway
item.description: U.S. smartphone market performance reports are out, and it was good news for one Android maker in particular.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.

item.title: 'X by Xreal' wants everyone in on AR glasses, launches entry-level pair for gamers, movie-lovers
item.description: Xreal debuted an entry-level sub-brand for AR glasses, and its introduction is joined by its first pair of lenses.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: An Xreal sub-brand, X by Xreal (XBX), debuted a new pair of entry-level AR glasses that offer interchangeable lenses, customizable front-frame styles, and thinner lenses for user comfortability.
media:content.media:text: An Xreal sub-brand, X by Xreal (XBX), debuted a new pair of entry-level AR glasses that offer interchangeable lenses, customizable front-frame styles, and thinner lenses for user comfortability.
media:content.media:title: An Xreal sub-brand, X by Xreal (XBX), debuted a new pair of entry-level AR glasses that offer interchangeable lenses, customizable front-frame styles, and thinner lenses for user comfortability.

item.title: Audeze's LCD-S20 is the mid-range planar headphone upgrade you deserve
item.description: Audeze has a new studio monitoring headset, and the LCD-S20 may just be one of the best the brand has released in recent years.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Audeze LCD-S20 planar headset against a grey craft sheet highlighting the product design
media:content.media:text: Audeze LCD-S20 planar headset against a grey craft sheet highlighting the product design
media:content.media:title: Audeze LCD-S20 planar headset against a grey craft sheet highlighting the product design

item.title: 7 first things you should do with the Google Fitbit Air
item.description: The Google Fitbit Air is giving Whoop a run for its money as a screenless fitness tracker, and these tips help you make the most of it.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Fitbit Air in a Lavender band and the Google Health app settings.

item.title: Forgot your ID at home? Don't worry — Here's how to use your Samsung Galaxy phone as a digital passport at TSA checkpoints
item.description: Samsung Wallet now lets Galaxy users use digital passports at TSA checkpoints at over 250 U.S. airports.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:text: Samsung logo on the back of a Samsung Galaxy phone
media:content.media:title: Samsung logo on the back of a Samsung Galaxy phone

item.title: Motorola slid affiliate codes into your Amazon orders, now states this was 'unintended'
item.description: Motorola was swiftly accused of hijacking the Amazon app and adding an affiliate link to users' orders, but officially states this was "unintended."
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Motorola logo
media:content.media:text: Motorola logo
media:content.media:title: Motorola logo

item.title: The best phones for PWM/flicker sensitive people 2026
item.description: Most modern phones use flickering displays that are harmful to some users. These are the phones that get around this problem and still offer a great experience.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: Leaked 'Galaxy Z Rollable' patent certainly is different, but not unheard of for Samsung
item.description: Rumors bring Samsung's wild rollable phone concept back to the table, as a patent for the "Galaxy Z Rollable" gets spotted.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: An alleged leaked mockup rendering of the "Galaxy Z Rollable" from Samsung, which shows a static "shell" that the phone's hardware slots into, as it rolls out from the left and back in.
media:content.media:text: An alleged leaked mockup rendering of the "Galaxy Z Rollable" from Samsung, which shows a static "shell" that the phone's hardware slots into, as it rolls out from the left and back in.
